description.en: Read a value from a Cloudflare Workers KV namespace.
description.de: Einen Wert aus einem Cloudflare Workers KV-Namespace lesen.

vars.API_TOKEN: env:CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN|Get your API token from Cloudflare Dashboard > My Profile > API Tokens.
vars.ACCOUNT_ID: env:CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID|Your Cloudflare Account ID from the dashboard overview page.

inputs.name: Namespace ID
inputs.bot: The KV namespace ID. Get this from the list-kv-namespaces warp.

inputs.name: Key
inputs.bot: The key name to read from the KV namespace.
